wins: Strong revenue growth across all businesses with 32% overall increase
Positive operating leverage in all 5 businesses and the firm overall
Capital return of over $17.5 billion, the most since the pandemic
Successful divestiture milestones including sale of Banamex stake
AI integration and adoption reaching above 70% globally
risks: Challenging year for commodities impacting fixed income
Regulatory compliance and safety and soundness concerns
Potential for slower growth in certain regions like China and Europe
